description: Letter fragment. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Tuesday night, 1 Adar 1539 Seleucid = 9 February 1228 CE. The writer advises the addressee to resort to the intervention of the mothers and wives of certain 'righteous gentiles': Umm Ibrāhīm and her son; the amir Najm al-Dīn; the wife of Jamāl al-Dīn "who was in the wilāya (=iqṭāʿ?)" of Mubāriz al-Dīn and represented him "in the gate of the Sultan"; and Sitt Masʿūd. He also asks the addressee to inquire about ophthalmics (ashyāfāt). Information from Goitein's note card. ASE.
description_he: שבר מכתב; ביהודית-ערבית; מתוארך: ליל שלישי, 1 לאדר 1539 שטרות = 9 בפברואר 1228 לספירה; מייעץ לנמען לפנות לאמהות ולנשות אנשים מסוימים; שואל על רפואות עיניים
